---
title: "Hello World"
subtitle: "2nd SARA Bootcamp 2026"
author: "Dr. Ajay Kumar Koli"
date: today
format: 
  html:
    embed-resources: true
---

## First Time Coding

- Relax

- Patience

## Having Fun

This is *just* the beginning. It will be **awesome** at the end. Learn more from this link <https://quarto.org/docs/reference/formats/html.html>.

## Add Image

![](images/rose.jpg)
